template.template_content_html:
Hi {$params['name']},

{$params['reviewer_name']} has left a review on your dealer profile.
View your reviews
template.template_content_plaintext: Hi {$params['name']}, {$params['reviewer_name']} left a review. View it here: {$params['review_url']}

template.template_content_html:
Hi {$params['name']},

{$params['reviewer_name']} has updated their review on your dealer profile.
View your reviews
template.template_content_plaintext: Hi {$params['name']}, {$params['reviewer_name']} updated their review. View it here: {$params['review_url']}
Hi {$params['name']}, your trial expires in {$params['days']} days.

template.template_content_html:
Hi {$params['name']},

{$params['dealer_name']} has disputed your review. You have until {$params['deadline']} to respond.

Respond here
template.template_content_plaintext: Hi {$params['name']}, {$params['dealer_name']} disputed your review. Respond by {$params['deadline']}: {$params['respond_url']}

template.template_content_html:
A dispute between {$params['dealer_name']} and {$params['reviewer']} needs your review.

View dispute

Hi {$params['name']},

Your review dispute has been dismissed. The review stands as-is.
template.template_content_plaintext: Hi {$params['name']}, your review dispute has been dismissed.

template.template_content_html:
Hi {$params['name']},

A review dispute involving {$params['dealer_name']} has been automatically resolved.
template.template_content_plaintext: Hi {$params['name']}, a dispute with {$params['dealer_name']} was auto-resolved.

template.template_content_html:
Hi {$params['name']},

Your review dispute has been upheld. The review will no longer affect your rating.

View your reviews
template.template_content_plaintext: Hi {$params['name']}, your dispute was upheld. View reviews: {$params['review_url']}
Hi {$params['name']}, a review dispute has been resolved.

template.template_content_html:
Hi {$params['name']},

{$params['dealer_name']} has responded to your review.

View response

Hi {$params['name']},

{$params['reviewer_name']} has submitted their response to your dispute on {$params['dealer_name']}. An admin will review the evidence and decide.

View in dashboard
template.template_content_plaintext: Hi {$params['name']}, {$params['reviewer_name']} responded to your dispute. Admin will review. {$params['review_url']}

template.template_content_html:
Hi {$params['name']},

An admin has reviewed your response to the dispute on {$params['dealer_name']} and asked for an update.

{{if $params['admin_note']}}

Admin's note: {$params['admin_note']}

{{endif}}

You have until {$params['deadline']} to update your response.

Update your response
template.template_content_plaintext: Hi {$params['name']}, An admin has reviewed your response to the dispute on {$params['dealer_name']} and asked for an update. {{if $params['admin_note']}}Admin's note: {$params['admin_note']}{{endif}} Update by {$params['deadline']}: {$params['respond_url']}
